part_frame.note: bracket-local (MEASURED benchmarks/_falbs_measure.py): bbox X[-15,15] Y[0,80] Z[0,30] = L30 x A80 x B30. Foot = base plate at Y 0..3.2 (seats on extrusion top, mounting face normal -Y). Vertical leg = thin 3.2 mm slab at the Z=0 edge, rising Y 0..80; its faces are normal to Z. Axle hole pierces the leg along +Z at (x=0, y=40) = H40, measured Oe3.24 (constant thru 3.2 mm) = M4 minor/tap-drill => M4 TAPPED (per PN suffix 'M4' + Hole-Type Selection Chart 'M'=tapped). Foot bolt hole pierces the base along -Y at (x=5, z=10), measured Oe5.50 => M5 CLEARANCE (per PN suffix 'NA5').

_RECONFIG_2026-06-21: Replaces the rejected ...-H40-N3 part. N3 had an M3 CLEARANCE axle hole (CONTRADICTED: could not anchor the 96654A131 M4 shoulder screw). This part was reconfigured to leg spec 'M4' (tapped) + base spec 'NA5' (M5 clearance). New CAD fetched + converted (cascadio) + measured: axle hole now Oe3.24 = M4 tapped (was Oe3.49 M3 clearance), foot hole Oe5.50 = M5 clearance. The idler->bracket screw_into_threaded_receiver edge is NO LONGER CONTRADICTED.

unknowns: thread depth assumed full leg thickness 3.2 mm; CAD cannot show counterbore/chamfer but PN 'M4' establishes the tap

base hole spec-2 ('NA') is illustrated as a 2-hole pattern (spaced S) in the family drawing; this configured PN's CAD shows only ONE clean Oe5.50 hole at (5,10). Second hole UNCONFIRMED in CAD -- needs the live configured 2-D drawing for this exact PN to confirm count/spacing before wiring a 2-bolt foot.

expected_ports.foot_mount_pattern: PARTIAL (1 M5-clearance hole confirmed; 2nd hole per family spec-2 unconfirmed in this CAD)

evidence.source_uri: out/mis_falbs_dwg.png (FALBS hole-spec chart) + out/falbs_cfg2.png (Hole Type Selection Chart)
evidence.locator: Hole spec-1 (leg): N/NA=Bolt Hole(clearance,counterbored); M/MA=Tapped; D/DA=Through. PN suffix 'M4' => M-type tapped, size 4.
evidence.raw_value: leg hole = M-type TAPPED M4 (this is the idler-axle receiver)
axle hole Oe3.24 constant through the 3.2 mm leg at (x=0,y=40), axis +Z (benchmarks/_falbs_measure.py)
evidence.notes: Oe3.24 == M4 tap-drill/minor diameter (M4 minor 3.242). A clearance M4 would be Oe4.5. Consistent with TAPPED, not clearance.

evidence.locator: Hole spec-2 (base): NA/MA. PN suffix 'NA5' => NA-type clearance bolt hole, size 5.

evidence.raw_value: ONE clean Oe5.50 foot hole at (x=5,z=10), axis -Y, through 3.2 mm base; no second hole in any Y-section (benchmarks/_falbs_measure.py)
